title: Semi-supervised Learning
summary: Learning from both labeled and unlabeled data, often using techniques like pseudo-labeling. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Limited Label Learning. Start after Supervised Learning and Q-Learning. It opens into Semi-Supervised Learning Techniques and probabilistic semi-supervised learning.
